label: OpenRouter
description: AI language model completion through OpenRouter. Works out of the box with platform credits (default: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6). Optionally connect an OpenRouterConfig node for BYOK or to override any parameter.

inputs.name: prompt
inputs.description: The prompt to send to the LLM

inputs.name: systemPrompt
inputs.description: Optional system prompt. Can be wired or set as a config field.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Optional OpenRouterConfig node. When wired, overrides this node's own config fields.

outputs.name: response
outputs.description: LLM response. Declare type in Weft: String without parseJson, or Dict/JsonDict with parseJson. With parseJson, you can also add custom output ports to extract specific JSON keys directly.

fields.label: System prompt
fields.description: Optional system prompt. Empty by default.

fields.label: Enable reasoning
fields.description: Use the model's reasoning/thinking mode if supported.

fields.label: Provider
fields.description: Serve the model from one specific OpenRouter provider (anthropic, fireworks, amazon-bedrock, ...). Leave empty to let OpenRouter route. Providers charge different rates for the same model, so pinning one also pins the price.

fields.label: Allow provider fallbacks
fields.description: When a provider is pinned, still fall back to others if it is unavailable. On by default. Turning it off makes the call fail rather than be served (and billed) by someone else.

fields.label: Parse JSON
fields.description: Parse and repair JSON from the response (changes output to Dict).

fields.label: API key
fields.description: Your own OpenRouter API key. Leave empty (or pick Platform) to use the key this deployment provides.
